Gatto Pew-Pew plays best like a monitor — landscape only.
Turn your device sideways to play.

⚠️

Couldn't load the game engine

This page needs to load Three.js and Firebase from the internet, and whatever is showing this page is blocking that — which usually happens when a downloaded file is opened straight from a "Downloads" app's built-in preview instead of a real browser.

Fix: open your Downloads app, long-press (or tap the ⋮ menu on) this file, and choose "Open with" → Chrome (or any real browser). If it still doesn't load there, check that the browser has an internet connection.

🐛

Something crashed

A script error stopped the game from loading properly. Please screenshot this and send it over:

🐾 PLAYERS

WASD move   drag scene to look   space shoot
Q yeet yourself   V mute mic   🟢 pads boost/rescue   💚 nip = frenzy   🔵 yarn = shield   🪶 feather = triple shot
🎮 left stick move   right stick look   RT/A fire   B yeet
